title: diosma patula
intro: Diosma patula, also known as the pink diasma or Cape diasma, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. Diosma patula has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and oils, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
